message:
feat(model): add source_repo field for multi-repo support

Add `source_repo` field to the Issue struct to support tracking issues
across multiple repositories. This enables beads_rust to work with
multi-repo workflows where issues may originate from or reference
different source repositories.

Changes:
- Add `source_repo: Option<String>` to Issue struct in model/mod.rs
- Add `source_repo TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '.'` column to schema
- Add migration to ensure source_repo column exists (bd compatibility)
- Update all SQL queries in sqlite.rs to include source_repo field
- Update blocked_issues_cache query offset from 35 to 36
- Add source_repo: None to all test fixtures across the codebase

The default value '.' indicates the current repository, maintaining
backward compatibility with existing databases and the Go implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
